title: verbascum × steniense
intro: Verbascum × steniense, also known as Stenobasis or Purple Mullein, is a hybrid plant species in the figwort family, characterized by its tall stature and vibrant purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × steniense include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
